title: Review-to-bundle case with an over-clean product brief
baseline_summary: Baseline already keeps the case inside the bounded review-to-bundle path, but the brief still looks cleaner and broader than its explicit constraints justify.
delta_summary_tail: recorded how polish encouraged invalid constraint inference.

comparison_axes.reason: The baseline frame is largely right, and Delta mainly narrows rather than replacing it.
Delta distinguishes grounded constraints from constraints borrowed from polish.
Delta resists treating a clean brief as proof of complete scope alignment.
Delta keeps thin-evidence concerns visible even though the baseline path remains usable.
Both tracks remain actionable after challenge, but Delta adds caution rather than a different route.
